programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When a God-fearing woman falls in love with a handsome ex-convict, he convinces her that his life of crime is behind him; he ropes her into helping him commit a double homicide, and she realizes she's in love with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Denise leads a campaign to get her streetwise study partner enrolled at Hillman.

programme.desc: Dwayne, alias "Dr. Cupid," takes to the airwaves to get a Valentine's Day date.

programme.desc: Denise and Whitley both appear in a play, and each believes the leading man is interested in her.

programme.desc: Whitley believes she has the Miss Hillman contest wrapped up -- until Denise enters Dwayne as a contestant.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Vanessa struggles when she receives her first disappointing grade in her advanced-placement class.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff takes over the house chores while Clair investigates a shady mechanic.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's college track coach convinces him to run a match race against a former rival.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff's widowed friend has found a new girlfriend who is young enough to be his daughter.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: James insists that Florida stay in a private hospital instead of the clinic for a minor operation.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: James is miserable to be around, and money -- or the lack of it -- is responsible.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The family is divided when James and Florida support rival candidates in a local election.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma receives unexpected support for her engagement to "Mr. Right.".

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida and James go off to a mountain cabin for a romantic celebration of their 20th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida gets the biggest surprise when she gives a surprise baby shower.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida fears the worst when a change in school causes a change in Michael.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The fact that Willona's new boyfriend has a physical disability creates a very awkward problem.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida pickets the neighborhood supermarket after a roast from the store makes everyone sick.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Everything seems to be coming up roses for the Evanses until all the good plans run into snags.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. is destroyed by a blow to his ego when he can't get a date with Thelma's classmate.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The FBI shows up at the Evanses' asking a lot of questions about Florida's cousin Cleatus.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma locates her grandfather and invites him home for her dad's birthday.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The numbers king of the neighborhood commissions J.J. to paint a portrait.

programme.desc: Chaos strikes when a gushing bride (Garcelle Beauvais) and her three friends (Essence Atkins, Terri J. Vaughn) travel to San Juan, Puerto Rico, for an exotic wedding.

programme.desc: The Huxtables and the determined director (Tony Orlando) of a community center help a badly beaten boy.

programme.desc: Clair and the children surprise Cliff by planning a birthday celebration around a Lena Horne concert.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: After three months of household turmoil, Cliff and Clair welcome the beginning of the school year.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: The Following Is a Sponsored Program
programme.desc: Synclaire auditions for an infomercial; Overton is unfaithful to Synclaire in his dreams.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: By exaggerating the importance of her job on a soap opera set, Regine sets Synclaire up for disappointment.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow...Dammit
programme.desc: Overton invites the gang to spend the holidays at his family's cabin in Canada.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine dates a handsome weatherman, then inadvertently dates his father.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a mother, her two children and her husband mysteriously vanish, investigators assume they simply moved away; a chilling discovery in the basement of an abandoned home proves the family may not be so perfect after all.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a charitable woman is stabbed to death by a panhandler, the city is left gripped with fear; as her husband calls for action, police begin to question the witness's story.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young lady is swept off her feet by an older man who spoils her with attention and gifts, but soon learns her new guy is actually the kingpin of an interstate drug operation.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman joins the police force to provide a better life for her family, then she discovers her husband has been hanging around with some shady characters, and she is desperate to find out more.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young beauty catches the eye of a popular Jamaican dance-hall DJ; he gives her a life of luxury, and in return, she gives him undying loyalty and love.

programme.desc: Jaleesa gets help from her roommates in overcoming her stage fright in speech class.

programme.desc: Overton's favorite uncle urges him to dump Synclaire.

programme.desc: Max comes to regret encouraging Kyle to date other women; Regine gets tickets to the Brian McKnight concert.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Stressed-out Khadijah consults a psychologist; Overton fears clowns.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Two pregnant sisters eagerly anticipate raising babies together until one mother winds up dead in a creek; but this brutal crime is just the beginning, as police uncover a months-long betrayal and a desperate act carried out by an unlikely rival.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: He moved to New York to pursue the American dream, and became successful beyond his wildest imagination; but when a violent attack turns the dream into a nightmare, police must untangle a sinister web of financial crimes and murderous envy.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman has the world at her fingertips until a charming bad boy sweeps her off her feet.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After escaping a bad relationship, a young woman thinks she has finally found Mr. Right; she quickly realizes her new man is actually worse than her ex.
